meaning: n.适合,一致,叠合,全等,相合性
examples: I must say that this push for congruence in all areas turned out beautifully.
This is how you achieve congruence between all the different parts of your life.
But with dubstep, there was a degree of non-congruence between the music and the vibe.
And perhaps more importantly, I wonder if he can pull it off with personal congruence, integrity and credibility.
But these eccentric triumphs have been largely hushed, and Mormonism now emphasizes its congruence with conventional Christianity rather than its differences.
